creator: robin@isometry.net
text:
Roger,

Unfortunately every dovecot release so far has been a beta in some  
sense. As it stands 1.0-rcXX is the current vendor supported and  
recommended release series. Before support was dropped for the 0.99  
series I had indeed intended to provide a separate dovecot-devel port  
in the run-up to 1.0, but as support was dropped for 0.99 I no longer  
feel this was appropriate. If you feel the vendor software is likely  
to be unstable, then I suggest you hold back on upgrading your  
production servers until stability reports have filtered back to the  
dovecot mailing list.
Running under x/inetd is discouraged by the vendor, however this  
particular bug is thought to be fixed in the latest 1.0-rc12 release,  
for which I intend to submit an update shortly.
If you continue to experience issues please feel free to e-mail me  
directly with details.

Shaun: Please close this PR, I will shortly be submitting a  
maintainer update which should fix the particular bug mentioned here.

Regards,
Robin
